zh.North Cadbury, Somerset, England: 英國薩默塞特諾斯 卡德波利
zh.Cadbury, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingd: 英國英格蘭戴文卡德波利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabella de Newmarch於大約1210年出生在英國薩默塞特時，她的父親James de Newmarch42歲，母親Matilda31歲。她於1224年與Ralph Russell Sheriff of Wiltshire結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世在英國。

zh-hans.North Cadbury, Somerset, England: 英国薩默塞特諾斯 卡德波利
zh-hans.Cadbury, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingd: 英国英格兰戴文卡德波利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabella de Newmarch于大约1210年出生在英国薩默塞特时，她的父亲James de Newmarch42岁，母亲Matilda31岁。她于1224年与Ralph Russell Sheriff of Wiltshire结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世在英国。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Newmarch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman: locative name from Neufmarché (Seine-Maritime). See   Anglo-Norman Families  .

variants.name: Newmark
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Emanuel, Chayim, Meyer, Shlomo, Vigdor.
Americanized form of Scandinavian Nymark: habitational name from farms named with ny ‘new’ + mark ‘field’.
Americanized form of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Neumark  .

variants.name: Anglo-Norman Families
meanings: 2  Norman, English: locative name from Martinvast (in Manche, France). See   Anglo-Norman Families  .

nameMeanings.name: Isabella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabella de Newmarch was born about 1210, in Somerset, England, her father, James de Newmarch, was 42 and her mother, Matilda, was 31. She married Ralph Russell Sheriff of Wiltshire in 1224. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabella de Newmarch est née environ 1210, à Somerset, Angleterre, son père, James de Newmarch, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Matilda, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Ralph Russell Sheriff of Wiltshire en 1224. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabella de Newmarch um 1210 in Somerset, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater James de Newmarch 42 und ihre Mutter Matilda 31. Sie hat 1224 Ralph Russell Sheriff of Wiltshire geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella de Newmarch è nata il circa 1210 nel Somerset, England, sua padre, James de Newmarch, aveva 42 anni e sua madre, Matilda, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Ralph Russell Sheriff of Wiltshire nel 1224. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel England.

ja.Kingston, Dorset, England: イギリスドールセトキングストン
ja.Gloucestershire, England: イギリスグロウセステルシュアイア
ja.Cadbury, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingd: イギリスイギリスデボンカドブリー
ja.lifeSummary: Isabella de Newmarchが約1210年にイギリスソメルセトで生まれた時，父James de Newmarchは42歳，母Matildaは31歳であった。1224年にRalph Russell Sheriff of Wiltshireと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabella de Newmarch(이)가 대략 1210년 영국 서머세트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 James de Newmarch(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Matilda(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1224년 Ralph Russell Sheriff of Wiltshire(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국에서 사망했다.

mn.North Cadbury, Somerset, England: North Cadbury, Bro an Hañv, Английн
mn.Cadbury, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingd: Cadbury, Devon, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella de Newmarch nasceu aproximadamente 1210, em Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, James de Newmarch, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Matilda, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Ralph Russell Sheriff of Wiltshire em 1224. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabella de Newmarch родилась около 1210 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, её отцу по имени James de Newmarch было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Matilda, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ralph Russell Sheriff of Wiltshire в 1224 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в местности Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabella de Newmarch nació aproximadamente 1210, en Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, James de Newmarch, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Matilda, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Ralph Russell Sheriff of Wiltshire en 1224. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en Inglaterra.
